data.title: Learning Beyond Paper Launches "Learning Beyond the Bell," the First Fully Digital, Bilingual Curriculum Designed for Afterschool and Out-of-School Time Programs
data.description: A recently launched platform is designed to assist students in grades K-6 with project-based curriculum that aligns with educational standards in six different learning areas. This initiative was introduced in West Palm Beach, Florida on March 26, 2026. Educators nationwide dedicate significant effort to help students throughout the school day.

data.title: Comporium Expands Fiber Network in Transylvania County With $4.7 Million Investment
data.description: In Brevard, N.C., over 500 homes and businesses in Transylvania County now benefit from Comporium's fiber-based internet service. The company recently completed the installation of about 64 miles of fiber, extending connectivity to 517 locations. This expansion allows residents and businesses in the area to access high-speed internet with speeds up to 1 Gigabit per second (Gbps). This enhanced connectivity supports various activities like work, education, healthcare, and entertainment for the community.

data.title: The new Broadband Battery from GS Yuasa Energy Solutions Provides High Performance and Long Life Even in the Hottest Climates
data.description: Key Highlights: GYES introduces the PYB Broadband battery, designed to excel in both performance and longevity. This specialized battery is proven to outlast competitors in rigorous testing conditions, making it a reliable choice for uncontrolled environments. The product testing conducted on GYES lead products in ROSWELL, Ga., on March 26 confirms their superior durability and lifespan, solidifying their reputation in the market.

data.title: Counterpart Expands Insurance Leadership Team as Demand Grows Across Management and Professional Liability
data.description: In Los Angeles, Counterpart, an AI-native managing general agent transforming management and professional liability insurance, has appointed Kelly North as VP of Revenue, Christina Melia as Director of Lawyers Professional Liability, and Sean Gleason as Director of Financial Services. These additions to the leadership team are set to drive Counterpart's growth in various specialty insurance sectors using their Agentic Insurance™ platform.

data.title: DOJ sues NewYork-Presbyterian for allegedly limiting insurance choices, keeping costs high.
data.description: The Justice Department has filed a lawsuit against a major health system in New York, alleging that it has hindered insurance companies from providing patients with more affordable alternatives. The lawsuit underscores concerns regarding anti-competitive practices in the healthcare industry and aims to address restrictions that impact access to cost-effective insurance options for consumers. The lawsuit emphasizes the importance of promoting competition in the healthcare sector to ensure affordable and accessible care for all.

data.title: Saputo Inc. Appoints Linda Mantia to Board of Directors
data.description: On March 26, 2026, Saputo Inc. (TSX: SAP) revealed the appointment of Linda Mantia to its Board of Directors as an independent director. This addition strengthens the board and brings valuable expertise to the company.

data.title: Regarding the approval of INVL Technology prospectus
data.description: INVL Technology has announced that, according to the Law on Collective Investment Undertakings in Lithuania, the company must have a valid prospectus prepared in compliance with this law or the Law on Securities of Lithuania for its operations as a Collective Investment Undertaking.
